response.step_by_step_log: 1. 00:00-04:10: Video contains an intro with non-vocal music. 2. 04:10: Vocal song 'Motteke! Sailor Fuku' begins, featuring multiple VTubers as performers. 3. Used search tool to identify original song info: Composer Satoru Kosaki, Lyrics Aki Hata. 4. Searched for and retrieved complete Japanese lyrics and their English translation. 5. Mapped the scenes and populated JSON fields accordingly.
response.global_summary: The video features a 3D musical performance of the song "Motteke! Sailor Fuku" (Lucky Star opening theme) by a group of VTubers, preceded by introductory footage.

scenes.description: Introductory footage with background music, featuring the title of the live show.
The vocal performance of the song 'Motteke! Sailor Fuku' begins, with VTubers dancing. The song continues until the end of the video.
